notes:
This release has different catalog numbers in the runouts compared to other visually similar releases. This was issued sometime between 2021 (when the new GZ job number was introduced) and 2025.

Issued in a gatefold jacket with printed inner sleeves.

Not to be confused with the [url=https://www.discogs.com/release/2555127-Taylor-Swift-Speak-Now]first United Records Pressing[/url] or the [url=https://www.discogs.com/release/31349344-Taylor-Swift-Speak-Now]second United Records Pressing[/url] releases.

This release has the international versions of "Mine", "Back to December", and "The Story of Us" instead of the US versions like prior pressings.

Issued in a gatefold sleeve.
Tracks are numbered sequentially regardless of side on rear cover, but respectively to side on labels.
Track durations are not listed on the release.
